sections.paragraph:
Original: מעשׂה

Transliteration: ma‛ăśeh

Phonetic: mah-as-eh'

BDB Definition:

  1. deed, work
    1. deed, thing done, act
    2. work, labour
    3. business, pursuit
    4. undertaking, enterprise
    5. achievement
    6. deeds, works (of deliverance and judgment)
    7. work, thing made
    8. work (of God)
    9. product

Origin: from H6213

TWOT entry: 1708a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
